'''dhaboko''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:hibernator|hibernator]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-b-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hibernator|hibernator]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| dhaboko
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhæbeketh|dhæbeketh]] || [[word:dhæbekej|dhæbekej]] || [[word:dhæbekesh|dhæbekesh]] || [[word:dhæbeke|dhæbeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhabobokoth|dhabobokoth]] || [[word:dhabobokoj|dhabobokoj]] || [[word:dhabobokosh|dhabobokosh]] || [[word:dhaboboko|dhaboboko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhabokoth|dhabokoth]] || [[word:dhabokoj|dhabokoj]] || [[word:dhabokosh|dhabokosh]] || [[word:dhaboko|dhaboko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhabofkoth|dhabofkoth]] || [[word:dhabofkoj|dhabofkoj]] || [[word:dhabofkosh|dhabofkosh]] || [[word:dhabofkof|dhabofkof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:dhabokotho|dhabokotho]] || [[word:dhabokojo|dhabokojo]] || [[word:dhabokosho|dhabokosho]] || [[word:dhabokoko|dhabokoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:dhabokoth|dhabokoth]] || [[word:dhabokoj|dhabokoj]] || [[word:dhabokosh|dhabokosh]] || [[word:dhaboko|dhaboko]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:dhabokothol|dhabokothol]] || [[word:dhabokojol|dhabokojol]] || [[word:dhabokoshol|dhabokoshol]] || [[word:dhabokokol|dhabokokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:dhabokothotho|dhabokothotho]] || [[word:dhabokojojo|dhabokojojo]] || [[word:dhabokoshosho|dhabokoshosho]] || [[word:dhabokoko|dhabokoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:dhabokothon|dhabokothon]] || [[word:dhabokojon|dhabokojon]] || [[word:dhabokoshon|dhabokoshon]] || [[word:dhabokokon|dhabokokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:dhabokothoro|dhabokothoro]] || [[word:dhabokojoro|dhabokojoro]] || [[word:dhabokoshoro|dhabokoshoro]] || [[word:dhabokokoro|dhabokokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|2edd495}}
